code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut result = ""
mut first = true
mut i = 0
mut cur = 0
mut has = false

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
    if has
      let sq = cur * cur
      if first
        result = "#{sq}"
        first = false
      else
        result = "#{result} #{sq}"
      end
      cur = 0
      has = false
    end
  else if b == 45
    i = i
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    has = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has
  let sq = cur * cur
  if first
    result = "#{sq}"
  else
    result = "#{result} #{sq}"
  end
end

println(result)
